2604.20755.title: V-tableR1: Process-Supervised Multimodal Table Reasoning with Critic-Guided Policy Optimization
2604.20755.paper_summary: We introduce V-tableR1, a process-supervised reinforcement learning framework that elicits rigorous, verifiable reasoning from multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Current MLLMs trained solely on final outcomes often treat visual reasoning as a black box, relying on superficial pattern matching rather than performing rigorous multi-step inference. While Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards could enforce transparent reasoning trajectories, extending it to visual domains remains severely hindered by the ambiguity of grounding abstract logic into continuous pixel space. We solve this by leveraging the deterministic grid structure of tables as an ideal visual testbed. V-tableR1 employs a specialized critic VLM to provide dense, step-level feedback on the explicit visual chain-of-thought generated by a policy VLM. To optimize this system, we propose Process-Guided Direct Alignment Policy Optimization (PGPO), a novel RL algorithm integrating process rewards, decoupled policy constraints, and length-aware dynamic sampling. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that V-tableR1 explicitly penalizes visual hallucinations and shortcut guessing. By fundamentally shifting multimodal inference from black-box pattern matching to verifiable logical derivation, V-tableR1 4B establishes state-of-the-art accuracy among open-source models on complex tabular benchmarks, outperforming models up to 18x its size and improving over its SFT baseline
2604.20755.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 V-tableR1，一個過程監督的強化學習框架，能夠從多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）中引出嚴謹且可驗證的推理。當前僅基於最終結果訓練的 MLLMs 通常將視覺推理視為一個黑箱，依賴於表面的模式匹配，而不是進行嚴謹的多步推理。雖然具有可驗證獎勵的強化學習可以強制執行透明的推理軌跡，但將其擴展到視覺領域仍然受到將抽象邏輯基礎設置到連續像素空間的模糊性所嚴重阻礙。我們通過利用表格的確定性網格結構作為理想的視覺測試平台來解決這個問題。V-tableR1 使用專門的批評者 VLM 來提供對政策 VLM 生成的明確視覺思維鏈的密集步驟級反饋。為了優化這個系統，我們提出了過程引導的直接對齊政策優化（PGPO），這是一種新穎的 RL 算法，整合了過程獎勵、解耦的政策約束和長度感知的動態抽樣。廣泛的評估表明 V-tableR1 明確懲罰視覺幻覺和捷徑猜測。通過從黑箱模式匹配根本轉變為可驗證的邏輯推導，V-tableR1 4B 在複雜的表格基準中建立了開源模型中的最先進準確性，超越了其大小高達 18 倍的模型，並在其 SFT 基準上有所改進。
2604.20755.author: Yubo Jiang et.al.
2604.20755.authors: Yubo Jiang, Yitong An, Xin Yang, Abudukelimu Wuerkaixi, Xuxin Cheng, Fengying Xie, Zhiguo Jiang, Cao Liu, Ke Zeng, Haopeng Zhang
